body:
Hey!

בשעה טובה ומוצלחת הנה התרגילים באסמבלר 3 ו-4.
אני שולחת באימייל כי לא היית אתמול, לא היו דפים במדפסת של המעבדת Computers,
ועודד אמר שזה בסדר. :)

אז החלמה מהירה,
Hila :)
explanation: The code provided in the assignment likely covers various concepts in assembly language programming. The projects are intended to help students understand low-level programming constructs, including memory management, control flow, and possibly interfacing with hardware. Given the context of the email, it appears to be an academic exercise related to those topics.

files.content:
l:	mov WORD PTR [0CCCDh],0FFFFh
	loop l
hlt

l:	and[bx],ah
	add bx,3
	loop l
	hlt

subject: Homework 3 and 4
summary: This project includes assignments 3 and 4 in assembly language.
